---
name: Publish animation
about: Auto-publish a Geedo Studio animation to the hub
title: 'Publish: '
labels: publish-animation
---

**Steps:**
1. Open **Geedo Studio** and click **Publish to Hub** (a `.geedo.json` file downloads).
2. Drag that downloaded file into this issue (anywhere in this textbox).
3. Click **Submit new issue**.

The Geedo bot will pack it, push it to the hub, and close this issue automatically.
You can paste the file below this line:
